title: 3D Treasury View
description: A 3D view of the player's treasury where coins are stacked relative to how rich the player is. This provides a visceral, satisfying representation of wealth accumulation. The treasury serves as a visual scorecard.
definition-of-done: 3D treasury scene with coin stacks. Stack height scales with wealth. Coins render with appropriate materials. Treasury accessible from main UI.
testing-plan: Verify treasury renders correctly. Test stack scaling with wealth. Verify coin materials look good. Test navigation to treasury.
